title: (Bearish Signal) GBOX enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Mar 10, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that GBOX's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 111 similar cases where GBOX's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 89 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $12.28 is above $6.12 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/05/21 - 03/10/21, the price experienced a +37% Uptrend. During the week of 03/03/21 - 03/10/21, the stock enjoyed a +4% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/gzejk2an6gm61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=e5c4e100467b8b44fa7a82dee1d145e289e11d3b

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for GBOX moved out of overbought territory on February 22, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 28 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 24 of the 28 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 86%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in  44 of 49 cases where GBOX's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 90%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 10, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on GBOX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 89 of 111 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for GBOX turned negative on February 25, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 48 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 42 of the 48 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 88%.

GBOX broke above its upper Bollinger Band on February 10, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9814565-greenbox-pos-gbox-11-94-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-mar-10-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
